nasb.text: Though I have become like a wineskin in the smoke, I do not forget Your statutes.

esv.text: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke, yet I have not forgotten your statutes.

cnv.text: 我雖然好像煙薰的皮袋， 我卻沒有忘記你的律例。

ccb.text: 我形容枯槁，好像烟熏的皮袋， 但我仍然没有忘记你的律例。

csbs.text: 虽然我像烟熏的皮囊， 但我没有忘记你的律例。
